summary: Composite an edited image over a base image through a coverage mask in premultiplied linear light (out = m·edited + (1−m)·base); the single MVP authorization boundary. Where the mask is 0 the output is the base bit-for-bit; where it is 1, the edited. Rejected on nonlinear (srgb) or straight-alpha input.

inputs.name: edited
inputs.doc: The premultiplied linear-light edited image, kept where the mask is 1.

inputs.name: base
inputs.doc: The premultiplied linear-light base image, kept where the mask is 0.

inputs.name: mask
inputs.doc: The coverage mask in [0, 1] selecting edited over base, co-located with the images.

outputs.name: image
outputs.doc: The composited image (the base descriptor; same extent/layout).

perceptual.reason: composite.masked_replace is a bit-exact per-channel premultiplied blend verified by mask-extreme exactness, outside-region bit-identity, and soft-mask blend properties; there is no perceptual-quality metric to apply
